# PERF-010 negative: template parsed once via sync.Once at package scope
lang: go
file: PERF-010-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	reportTmpl *template.Template
	reportOnce sync.Once
)

func loadReport() *template.Template {
	reportOnce.Do(func() {
		reportTmpl, _ = template.New("report").Parse(`<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>`)
	})
	return reportTmpl
}

func RenderReport(c *gin.Context) {
	tmpl := loadReport()
	c.Header("Content-Type", "text/html; charset=utf-8")
	_ = tmpl.Execute(c.Writer, gin.H{"Title": "Hello"})
}
